## Collections.Classes.MaterializingResultMapView type

A read-only result map view where `get()` materializes values and caches them.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type MaterializingResultMapView<TKey extends string = string, TValue = unknown> = IReadOnlyResultMap<TKey, TValue>;
```
**References:** [IReadOnlyResultMap](./ts-utils.ireadonlyresultmap.md)
